# CTF Maintenance

> Locally owned lawn and landscape maintenance company serving Gainesville, FL and surrounding Alachua County.

## Business
- Owner: Charles Foster
- Founded: 2011
- Location: 1430 N.W. 55th St., Gainesville, FL 32605
- Phone: 352-318-7745
- Email: fostercharles352@gmail.com
- Website: https://ctfmaintenance.com/
- Hours: Mon–Fri 7am–6pm, Sat 8am–3pm, Sun Closed

## Services
Lawn mowing, edging, weed eating, hedging, trimming, tree trimming and removal, weed pulling, flower bed maintenance, mulch installation, sod installation (Zoysia, St. Augustine, Bahia), pressure washing (driveways, walkways, roofs, gutters), eviction cleanouts, property cleanups, hauling, junk removal (free scrap metal haul), irrigation system installation and repair.

## Service Area
Gainesville FL, Alachua County, North Central Florida. Neighborhoods served include Haile Plantation, Tioga, NW Gainesville, and surrounding communities.

## Credentials
- 15+ years in business
- 800+ clients served
- 5-star average rating
- Licensed and insured
- Florida certified landscapers

## Notable
- Scrap metal hauled free
- Free estimates
- 24-hour turnaround for realtors and property managers
- Florida-native expertise: Zoysia, St. Augustine, Bahia grass; sandy soils; humid subtropical climate
